header.title: IA Recipe Generator
header.short: AI-powered recipe generator: enter ingredients and preferences to receive typed recipes with macros, times and difficulty.

summary.heading: Summary
summary.text: IA Recipe Generator (ChefcitoIA) is an SPA that builds personalized recipes from user-provided ingredients and preferences. The app validates inputs, orchestrates calls to AI providers via internal routes, and maps the response to a safe typed domain model for UI consumption.

problem.heading: Problem solved
problem.text: Many users struggle to combine available ingredients or adapt recipes to dietary restrictions/portions. This tool aims to convert simple inputs into practical, clear and safe recipes without relying on raw AI output.

techTools.heading: Technologies & tools
techTools.text: Stack chosen for fast iteration and production readiness: React 19 + Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind for UI; Zod for typed validation; Vitest for testing. AI calls are orchestrated from internal routes to keep dev UX simple.
list: React 19 + Vite 5 (SPA, HMR, fast builds)
TypeScript (strict typing)
Tailwind CSS 4
Zod for input validation
Fetch + AbortController for request handling and cancellation
Internal /api/recipe-generator endpoints delegating to AI providers
Vitest + Testing Library for unit & integration tests

architecture.heading: Architecture & decisions
architecture.text: Feature-folder pattern: components, model and services kept per feature. Internal API routes (/api/recipe-generator/*) allow the UI to work during dev without an external backend. A strict mapper (recipeMapper) validates and normalizes IA responses before use.

implementation.heading: Featured implementation
implementation.hookDescription: Lightweight client that posts generation requests to the internal endpoint and delegates response mapping to a strict mapper (mapApiRecipeToDomain) to ensure a safe typed domain model.

accessibility.heading: Accessibility
accessibility.lead: UI prioritizes accessible controls, keyboard navigation and clear messages for states (loading/error).
list: Form controls with labels and appropriate aria attributes.
Accessible error and status messages (alert roles) for generation operations.
Keyboard-first: visible focus and full navigability.

performance.heading: Performance & results
list: Cancellation of previous requests with AbortController to avoid wasted work.
Optimized rendering: separate input and result panels to minimize costly re-renders.
Production build optimized with Vite; deployed preview on Vercel.

challenges.heading: Challenges & learnings
list: Validating and normalizing generative model responses (inconsistent payloads).
Avoiding race conditions between generation requests — used AbortController + request sequence checks.
Balancing UX and strict validation without blocking the user.

improvements.heading: What could be improved
list: Local history and caching of generated recipes.
Instrument cost/latency metrics per AI provider.
Add E2E tests for the full flow (Playwright).
Add i18n to reach a broader audience.
